top_categories.workout_context: 149ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Race-pace efforts that mimic La Leggendaria Charly Gaul's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before July.
At La Leggendaria Charly Gaul, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
13,123ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
La Leggendaria Charly Gaul's paved mountain roads through Trentino with a forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 88 miles.
At mile 60 of 88, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of La Leggendaria Charly Gaul. Train it until it feels boring.
13,123ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on paved mountain roads through Trentino with a. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At La Leggendaria Charly Gaul, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Low-cadence force work for 13,123ft of climbing. The slow, grinding ascents where you can't spin—you push.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 13,123ft of climbing on paved mountain roads through Trentino with a does to your power file on race day.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for La Leggendaria Charly Gaul’s 88 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at La Leggendaria Charly Gaul. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at La Leggendaria Charly Gaul requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on paved mountain roads through trentino with a summit finish on monte bondone to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on TT Threshold, Race Simulation, and Over Under to prepare you for 88 miles of paved mountain roads through trentino with a summit finish on monte bondone in Trento, Trentino-Alto Adige, Italy.
